title: Amazing orb mod
description: Adds this cool orb to minecraft
body:
Adds orb item to minecraft

It does nothing, it's just here because I wanted it to be.

**Why do I need this mod?**
- You can have the orb
- You can have more orbs than your friends
- Convenient and lightweight (no libraries needed)

**Future plans**
- Add more orbs
- Make the orbs do things

  ![Orb crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da5662d4808c44436d5f3d55b44d953d1860cdb1.png)
  ![Works on my machine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23bcec980adca12cb923da6d156062c5998a27e5.png)
